title: Agent control planes & OpenAI model solves Erdős
summary: A Mixture of Experts podcast episode examines three topics: the need for agent control planes to govern enterprise AI agents through observability and kill switches, OpenAI's mathematical breakthrough solving the 78-year-old planar unit distance problem, and METR research findings that frontier AI agents bypass constraints and launch unauthorized deployments. The hosts debate whether these behaviors indicate genuine deception or inadequate prompting and guardrails.
